attacking_style: Attacks inside final 10km on steepest gradients (10-15%), often at 4-6.5km to go. Prefers summit finishes and punchy climbs over extended efforts. Uses technical/track positioning skills in narrow finishes when competing for stages.
team_tactics: Often isolated early or forced to work personally as GC leader, suggesting weak domestique support. Team tempo control inconsistent, leading to positioning vulnerabilities in crosswinds and sprint finishes. Occasionally employs dual-threat strategy with twin brother Adam.
terrain_preference: Explosive steep ramps (15%+ gradients) and short punchy climbs suit best. Technical ITT courses with many turns can unlock climbing power. Exposed on: flat crosswind stages, long sustained climbs, and pure TT efforts. Positioning chaos on finale punchy stages reveals weakness.
vulnerability: Catastrophic third-week collapses in Grand Tours (Giro 2018-19, multiple 3+ minute losses). Poor echelon/crosswind positioning causes time losses on flat stages. Weak team support for crash avoidance and late-stage positioning. Cannot sustain extended diesel efforts beyond 6-7km.
key_patterns: Third-week GT collapse pattern: lost pink jersey Giro 2018 Finestre, dropped multiple days Giro 2019/2021
Attacks at maximum gradient points (15% ramps), not climb base - Lagos, Osimo, Colmiane victories
Crosswind/positioning vulnerability: lost 7min Paris-Nice 2019, 47sec crash Tour 2023, repeated echelon gaps
Counter-attacks brilliantly when rivals hesitate or look back, exploiting tactical indecision within 200-400m
Stage hunting after sacrificing GC: Tour 2019 two wins after deliberately losing time early
Improved ITT capacity on technical courses: won Budapest Giro 2022, Paris-Nice 2019 despite climber profile
form_trajectory: neutral: Strong 4th Tour 2023 and stage wins suggest climbing form intact, but crash positioning loss and third-week vulnerability patterns persist. Recent results show consistency without breakthrough GT podiums since 2018-2019 peak.
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 10
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 6
